ALLEGE FACTS THAT THE PLAINTIFF WAS ENTITLED TO A MANAGEMENT FEE (IN LIGHT OF THE EXPIRATION OF THE MANAGEMENT AGREEMENT) FOR 2015 AND 2016. 6. RE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF, ALLEGE A CONTROVERSY FOR WHICH DECLARATION IS BEING SOUGHT THAT IS NOT ALREADY BEING ADDRESSED IN OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Anglea Pourtabib, CSR#13714, 415-601-7054 @apourtabib@gmail.com

The Court inquries if there was compliance the tentative ruling rule. Counsel did not comply. Counsel states that he was unware of the tentative ruling rule and did not give notice to the other side. The matter is not argued; counsel submits to the tentative ruling.
The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT BFIM-CALIFORNIA ACQUISITION CORP., ERRONEOUSLY, EDISON CAPITAL HOUSING INVESTMENTS, EDISON CAPITAL HOUSING PARTNERS, XI, LLC DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith as follows:

1. Allege facts showing that each defendant is a proper party to the cause of action for Specific Performance of the Option Agreement;

2. Allege facts showing that the Defendants' acts and/or omissions prevented Plaintiff from exercising its option, i.e. that the timely exercise of the option was impossible in light of Defendant's acts and omissions.

3. Allege facts showing what the deadline for the option was. If Plaintiff pleads in the alternative, each element for each alternative to be clearly alleged: (1) January 1, 2015 and that option was properly exercised prior to the deadline and/or Plaintiff was prevented from exercising by Defendants' acts or omissions; and/or (2) January 1, 2016 (include facts addressing Statute of Frauds) 2015 and that option was properly exercised prior to the deadline and/or Plaintiff was prevented from exercising by Defendant's acts or omissions.

4. Allege facts (not conclusions) that the transfer of the limited partner's interest was improper in light of judicially noticeable documents and Delaware Law.

5. Allege facts that the Plaintiff was entitled to a management fee (in light of the expiration of the Management Agreement) for 2015 and 2016.

6. Re cause of action for declaratory relief, allege a controversy for which declaration is being sought that is not already being addressed in other causes of action. Order signed in Open Court.
